name: Shadow Step
description: Move before they see you coming.

name: Poisoner's Precision
description: Patient and methodical — every strike counts.

name: Quick Reflexes
description: React to danger a half-breath before it lands.

name: Battle Hardened
description: Years of combat have only added muscle.

name: Thick Skin
description: Takes a hit and keeps swinging.

name: War Cry Discipline
description: Rage channeled into purpose; energy follows fury.

name: Arcane Focus
description: The mind sharpened to a single burning point.

name: Mana Well
description: Deep reserves — never the first to run dry.

name: Studied Reflexes
description: Pattern recognition turns theory into survival.

name: Iron Guard
description: Armor worn like a second skin.

name: Stalwart
description: Built to hold the line long after others break.

name: Shield Discipline
description: Block, brace, endure — in that order.

name: Street Smart
description: The best education Badurga's alleys offer.

name: Nimble Fingers
description: Light-handed work demands light feet too.

name: Survival Instinct
description: Never stays anywhere that feels wrong for long.

name: Disciplined Stance
description: Drilled posture that deflects more than it looks.

name: Unit Cohesion
description: Trained to hold formation even when the mind screams to run.

name: Combat Training
description: Basic: strike hard, finish fast.

name: Analytical Mind
description: Reads a problem three ways before acting.

name: Focused Study
description: Long hours breed patience and mental stamina.

name: Breadth of Knowledge
description: Knows a little about nearly everything.

name: Hearty Constitution
description: A lifetime of early mornings and honest labor.

name: Enduring Spirit
description: Keeps going past the point where others sit down.

name: Patient Resolve
description: The oven teaches you to wait for the right moment.

name: Iron Constitution
description: Shrugs off punishment through raw endurance.

name: Combat Mastery
description: Practiced form that adds edge to every strike.

name: Spell Memory
description: Knowledge hoarded across a hundred grimoires.

name: Evasive Footwork
description: Always one step ahead of the blade.

name: Relentless Assault
description: Keep moving — keep hitting.

name: Arcane Resilience
description: The trained mind braces the body against harm.

name: Iron Will
description: Refuses to break under any circumstance.

name: Veteran Instinct
description: Old scars teach better defense than any trainer.

name: Opportunist
description: Always first to grab what others left behind.

name: Quick Grab
description: If it's there it's already yours.

name: Waste Not
description: Nothing edible is wasted. Nothing useful left behind.

name: Crowd Pleaser
description: Fight for the crowd — fight harder.

name: Brutal Technique
description: No form no rules. Just results.

name: Iron Chin
description: Took a thousand hits to get here. Still standing.
